title: aulomyrcia subverticillaris var. incanescens
intro: Aulomyrcia subverticillaris var. incanescens is a variety of the Aulomyrcia subverticillaris species, a plant native to South America. It is also known as Brazilian pepper tree and is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aulomyrcia subverticillaris var. incanescens include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine.
